title: erodium cheilanthifolium subsp. celtibericum
intro: Erodium cheilanthifolium subsp. celtibericum is a subspecies of the herbaceous perennial plant Erodium cheilanthifolium, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is also known as Spanish storksbill or Celtiberian storksbill, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Erodium cheilanthifolium subsp. celtibericum are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and prevent oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to support overall health and well-being, particularly in the management of respiratory issues and gastrointestinal disorders.
